subcodes.first_line: ...O servant of God! The aforementioned thousand three hundred and thirty-five years must be reckoned from the day of the flight of His Holiness Muhammad, the Apostle of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی هزار و سیصد و سی و پنج سنه مذکوره بدایتش از یوم هجرت حضرت رسول
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @spiritual transformation, @growth of the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness
